## Problem

_What problem needs solving? Who is affected?_

## Why Now?

_Why is this important right now? What happens if we don't address it?_

## Urgency

- [ ] Blocking other work
- [ ] Next quarter priority
- [ ] Nice to have

## Existing Research

_Link to any research, data, or customer feedback that supports this. Or "None yet"._
